SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AuthPage
JavaFX screen that provides login and registration forms.
AuthResult
Immutable result object returned by AuthService operations.
AuthService
Service interface for user authentication operations.
AuthSession
Application-wide singleton that tracks the currently authenticated user.
chatbot
Floating AI chat assistant powered by the Google Gemini API.
DatabaseAuthService
Database-backed implementation of AuthService.
ExerciseDataset
Single row from megaGymDataset.csv (Title, Desc, Type, BodyPart, Equipment, Level).
ExerciseRepository
Disk-cached Kaggle megaGymDataset.
IUserDAO
Data access object interface for User persistence operations.
KaggleClient
Thin Kaggle REST API client (https://www.kaggle.com/api/v1).
KaggleConfig
Kaggle API credentials.
KaggleException
Checked exception for any Kaggle API failure (auth, HTTP, parsing).
Main
JavaFX application entry point for FormCoach.
Navigator
One navigation primitive for the whole app.
PasswordUtil
Utility class for hashing and verifying passwords using PBKDF2 with HMAC-SHA256.
PoseValidationException
Thrown by textoutputgen when pose data fails validation checks, such as null arrays, NaN values, or an unrecognised exercise type.
ProfilePage
JavaFX screen that displays and allows editing of the current user's account details.
SqliteConnection
Singleton that provides a shared SQLite Connection to the application's users.db database.
SqliteUserDAO
SQLite-backed implementation of IUserDAO.
textoutputgen
Generates human-readable feedback from pose landmark comparisons.
textoutputgen.PoseResult
Immutable result object produced after pose analysis.
User
Model class representing a registered FormCoach user account.
UserRegistrationRequest
Data transfer object carrying the credentials needed to register a new user account.

FormCoach — CAB302 Project
